# Product Image Library

Store product images by category in this directory so the catalog stays organized.

Recommended structure:
- `shared/` for generic placeholders or cross-category assets
- one folder per public category slug

Examples:
- `reverse-osmosis-systems/`
- `pumps-fluid-handling/`
- `water-treatment-chemicals/`

Suggested naming:
- use lowercase with hyphens
- include model or size when useful
- keep one main product image per item first, then add alternates later

Example filenames:
- `bw30-4040-membrane.jpg`
- `chemical-dosing-pump-12lph.jpg`
- `uv-sterilizer-55w.jpg`
